docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
ORDER CONTINUANCE FOR PROGRESS REPORT. MATTER CONTINUED TO SEPTEMBER 3, 2021 AT 1:30 P.M. IF NO APPEARANCE, CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS SETTLED. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY PLAINTIFF DAWN, SOUBHIK
ORDER RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM **GRANTED**
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $8,850.00 FILED BY DAWN, SOUBHIK AS TO DEFENDANT GALIK, BEN (AKA BENEDICT ROBERT GALIK JR) ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-03-2021 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-03-2021 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO SEP-03-2021 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. COURT DISCLOSURE IS GIVEN. PLAINTIFF SOUBHIK DAWN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT BEN GALIK IS PRESENT. PARTIES AGREE TO A SETTLEMENT IN THE AMOUNT OF $2,950.00. NO APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED IF PAYMENT IS MADE AS AGREED AND THE MATTER WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS SETTLED. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS ARE REVIEWED AND RETURNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
DECLARATION RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY PLAINTIFF DAWN, SOUBHIK
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $90.00) SERVED APR-27-2021, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT GALIK, BEN (AKA BENEDICT ROBERT GALIK JR)
